case_title: REDDING MEDICAL CENTER VS. UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD AS MADE: P/A: DECLARATION OF LAURA J. BARRIOS IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PETITIONER REDDING MEDICAL CENTER

DECLARATION OF CARRIE MCLAIN IN RESPONSE TO THE SUPPLEMENTAL DEC. OF DENNIS G ROLSTAD AND IN SUPPORT OF PETITIONER'S OPPOS. TO UNITED'S MTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AS MADE FILED BY PETITIONER REDDING MEDICAL CENTER
RESPONSE TO OBJECTION OF DECLARATION OF CARRIE MCLAIN SUBMITTED BY PETITIONER IN OPPOSITION TO RESPONDENT'S SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER REDDING MEDICAL CENTER
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER REDDING MEDICAL CENTER AS TO RESPONDENT UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SEE CASE HISTORY-DATED: 12/04/07-03/05/08 FILED BY PETITIONER REDDING MEDICAL CENTER

NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OBJECTION TO UNTIMELY DECLARATION OF CARRIE MCLAIN SUBMITTED BY PETITIONER IN OPPOSITION, AND REQUEST THAT IT NOT BE CONSIDERED FILED BY RESPONDENT UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED AS MADE, INCLUDING ALL THE PROVISIONS OF PARAGRAPHS 65 THROUGH 68. BY CONFIRMING THE AWARD, THE COURT IS NOT MAKING ANY DETERMINATION WHETHER IT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

DECLARATION OF (SUPPLEMENTAL) OF DENNIS G ROLSTAD FILED BY RESPONDENT UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY
